name: Math Absolute
description: Returns the absolute value of a number.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

class MathAbsNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Math Absolute"
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.icon_path = "icons/math.svg"
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("value", "float", widget_type="float")
        self.add_output("result", "float")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]
        
    async def execute(self, inputs):
        val = float(inputs.get('value', 0.0))
        return {'result': abs(val)}

def register_node():
    return MathAbsNode
